title: mentha × sativa subsp. paludosa
intro: Mentha × sativa subsp. paludosa, also known as marsh pennyroyal or marsh peppermint, is a subspecies of hybrid mint native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains menthone, a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compound. The health benefits of Mentha × sativa subsp. paludosa include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural decongestant, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
